title: Better Than Fireflies
description: This is a mod that takes the lazy vanilla drops like fireflies and instead adds actually needed features, transforming an innocent children game into grindy nightmare (still in alpha).
body:
Spinomod is a mod by Spiinosauro designed to add a charming, Vanilla+ experience to Minecraft, enhancing the game while keeping it lightweight and close to the core vanilla feel. Although still in its early stages, this mod brings a variety of small yet impactful changes, with plans for future expansions. Some features are still in progress, so please report any bugs.

Tech Update incoming.
